parameters.jsCode: const input=$json; if(!input.event_id||!input.workflow_name) throw new Error('Incomplete alert envelope'); return [{json:{event_id:input.event_id,workflow_name:input.workflow_name,status:input.status??'error',summary:String(input.error_message??'Workflow failed').slice(0,500),records_processed:Number(input.records_processed??0),records_failed:Number(input.records_failed??0),alert_dedupe_key:`${input.event_id}:final-alert`}}];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { alert_dedupe_key: $json.alert_dedupe_key, workflow_name: $json.workflow_name, event_id: $json.event_id, status: $json.status, summary: $json.summary, records_processed: $json.records_processed, records_failed: $json.records_failed } }}
